direct-sql: Replace direct SQL with data entities, services, exports, or reporting replicas.
aif: Redesign AIF services using OData, custom services, Business Events, or middleware.
overlayering: Replace overlayering with extensions, Chain of Command, and event handlers.
client-dependency: Remove COM, ActiveX, WinAPI, local file, and client-side dependencies.
posting: Run senior solution architecture review and define reconciliation tests.
